lines.speaker: Melvin
lines.text: I can't believe we've finally arrived, I can't wait to explore!

lines.speaker: Melvin
lines.text: So much to see, I don't know where to start!

lines.speaker: Melvin
lines.text: A whole new continent to explore... what a time to be alive!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I'm just as lost as you.

lines.speaker: Melvin
lines.text: I overheard someone mention there are pirates and thieves here, be careful!
